arts.ttl: Serie A sides weighing up offers for misfiring Man United forward
arts.sum: Serie A clubs are monitoring Rasmus Hojlund situation’s at Manchester United ahead of the summer transfer window. Hojlund has endured a disappointing second season at Old Trafford, with the Denmark international having struggled for form. The 22-year-old has scored just three goals in the Premier League and only eight in 41 appearances across all competitions. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain wonderkid Desire Doue has recently been linked with Manchester United and would apparently cost absolutely crazy money. The talented young Frenchman has been in superb form recently, scoring a delightful solo goal for PSG in their Champions League victory over Aston Villa last night. arts.ttl: Amorim: Winning Europa League would be huge for Man Utd's future
arts.sum: While Man Utd have struggled in the Premier League this season, losing 13 matches, they are unbeaten in the Europa League, winning six games and drawing four, including a 5-2 aggregate victory over Real Sociedad in the last 16. But Amorim has warned his team that they now face a formidable opponent, with Lyon winning six of their last seven matches in all competitions, including a 7-1 aggregate triumph over Steaua Bucharest in the last round of the Europa League.

arts.ttl: ‘They want to make an example of me’ – Paulo Fonseca hits out at 9-month ban
arts.sum: Paulo Fonseca will be on the sidelines tonight as his Olympique Lyonnais host Manchester United in the first leg of their Europa League quarter-final. A rare occasion for the head…
